name: Operations Dashboard
description: Live fraud rate, transaction volume, and inference latency percentiles over the past 24 hours.

cards.name: Live Fraud Rate (24h)
cards.query: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_flagged = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0.0) AS fraud_rate_percentage FROM predictions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

cards.name: Daily Transaction Count
cards.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_transactions FROM predictions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

cards.name: Inference Latency Percentiles (24h)
cards.query: SELECT percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_latency_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95_latency_ms, percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p99_latency_ms FROM predictions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
